title: Smoky BBQ Stir Fry
description: A fusion of smoky BBQ flavors with the quick and easy cooking of a stir fry.

ingredients.name: Stir-fry vegetables (bell peppers, carrots, broccoli)
ingredients.notes: any combination of your favorite stir-fry vegetables

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add garlic and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add stir-fry vegetables and cook until they start to soften, about 3-4 minutes.
Add soy sauce and stir-fry for another 2 minutes.
Stir in smoky BBQ sauce and cook for 1 minute.
Season with herbs and serve hot.
